footer.about: Qualified trading partners for international commerce, to help you grow your business.

hero.badge: Marketplace of verified B2B trading partners
hero.title: Qualified importer and distributor lists for your international trade.
hero.subtitle: Find exactly the trading partners that fit your product and your export strategy.

intro.lede: Our qualified importer and distributor lists are built for manufacturers, producers, and brand owners looking for new trading partners abroad.
intro.p1: Select by country, industry, language region, or buying profile and receive ready-to-use databases, updated periodically.
intro.p2: Our lists bring together companies checked against public sources — their website, digital presence and available public records — within the industry and market each list sets out to cover. Every list comes with a PDF market study, so you can assess the companies' profile before reaching out.

zielmaerkte.title: Precise selection by your target markets.
zielmaerkte.intro: You get lists for individual countries or entire language regions, for example:
zielmaerkte.note: We also offer industry-specific lists for a range of sectors and product groups. Step by step, we're expanding our offering with qualified lists for markets around the world.

einkaufsprofile.title: Not every importer is the same.
einkaufsprofile.intro: Our databases distinguish between several buying profiles:
einkaufsprofile.close: This lets you focus your sales activities exactly on the trading partners suited to your product.

cards.title: Global buyers
cards.body: Companies looking for new products and suppliers worldwide.

cards.title: EU-focused
cards.body: Importers that buy exclusively within the European Union.

cards.title: Mercosur-oriented
cards.body: Companies that preferably import from Mercosur.

cards.title: Regional specialists
cards.body: Specialists with clearly defined sourcing markets.

lieferumfang.title: More than address lists.
lieferumfang.reportBody: Every list includes an up-to-date market report with valuable information on the industry and sales opportunities in the target market.
lieferumfang.listIntro: You also get practical guidance on the following topics:
lieferumfang.close: This increases your export campaign's chances of success right from the first contact.
items: What information and documents importers expect before a partnership
How to approach potential distributors professionally
Which sales arguments are most promising on first contact

daten.title: Data reviewed periodically.
daten.body: Lists are compiled by our operation, and each company is checked against public sources — its website, its digital presence and available public records — before it enters the catalogue. The catalogue is reviewed periodically: when a list no longer reflects the market it describes, we take it off sale.

vorteil.title: Save time and increase your sales success.
vorteil.body: Instead of spending weeks or months researching suitable importers and distributors, you immediately receive a qualified selection of potential trading partners that fit your product and your target market. This lets you focus on what matters — successfully building your international trade.

howItWorks.title: From search to ready-to-use file in three steps.

steps.title: Filter
steps.body: Browse by countries, language regions, industries, and buying profiles to find lists that fit your campaign.

steps.title: Buy
steps.body: Review volume, price per lead, and list details before completing your order with secure checkout.

steps.title: Download
steps.body: Once payment is confirmed, download the market study PDF in the My Purchases area.

blog.title: Market analyses, industry reports, and export opportunities.
blog.intro: On our blog we regularly publish market analyses, industry reports, and information on export opportunities, trade trends, and sales possibilities across various countries and regions. This keeps you up to date on international market developments.

cta.title: Ready to build your international trade?
cta.body: Browse the catalog and find qualified importers and distributors that fit your product and target market.

meta.title: Importer and distributor lists
meta.description: Importer and distributor lists by country, sector and buying profile, with companies checked against public sources. For exporters.

page.title: Frequently asked questions
page.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about our importer and distributor lists.
page.metaDescription: Answers to frequently asked questions about our importer and distributor lists: data quality, formats, payment, and more.

items.question: Where does the data come from and how is it verified?
items.answer: The lists come out of our own research and are compiled by our operation. Before a company enters a list, we check it against publicly available sources — its website, its digital presence and available public records — to confirm that it exists, that it works in the stated industry and that its contact channels are active.

items.question: How current are the lists?
items.answer: Each list's page shows when its data was last reviewed. The catalogue is reviewed periodically, and when a list no longer reflects the market it is taken out of the catalogue instead of staying on sale.

items.question: What formats do I receive the data in?
items.answer: What you receive is a market study as a PDF. Once payment is confirmed, the file is available for download under My purchases and stays accessible in your account.

items.question: Can I see the data before buying?
items.answer: Yes. On each list's page you can see the coverage (countries, industries and language), the date the data was reviewed, the price and a sample of records with the email partially masked. The full data is released after purchase.

items.question: How does payment work?
items.answer: Payment is handled by PayPal in the site checkout. As soon as the payment is confirmed, the purchase appears under My purchases and the download is unlocked.

items.question: Which countries and industries are lists available for?
items.answer: Coverage is whatever is published in the catalogue at any given moment: there you can filter by country, industry and category to see what is available today. New lists are added to the catalogue as they are finished.

items.question: What's included in the market report that comes with the list?
items.answer: Every list comes with a market study as a PDF, prepared for that list's market. Because the content is tailored to the country and the industry, it differs from list to list — the introduction shown on each list's page summarises what that study covers.

items.question: What about data protection (LGPD/GDPR)?
items.answer: The lists hold business contact data collected from publicly available sources: company name, country, industry, website, general e-mail addresses and phone numbers — and, in some lists, the name and role of a contact person as well. When you buy, we ask for your name, e-mail and tax id, used to process the payment and release the download. Any person or company can ask us to correct or remove their data from our lists: use the contact form further down this same page. The full policy is in our Privacy Policy, at /privacy.

meta.title: Who we are and how the data is built
meta.description: How our lists of importers and distributors are built: our own research, checks against public sources and periodic review of the catalogue.

hero.title: Who is behind the lists
hero.subtitle: Easy Prospect gathers importers and distributors into market-study PDFs, so exporters know who to talk to. This page explains how that data is produced.

methodology.title: How the data is produced
methodology.intro: Anyone paying for B2B data deserves to know where it comes from. The process is described below, with no promises we cannot keep.

blocks.title: Where the data comes from
blocks.body: The lists began as our own research and are compiled by the Easy Prospect operation. Each one is built around the sector and the market it sets out to cover.

blocks.title: Checked against public sources
blocks.body: Before a company enters a list, it is checked against public sources — its institutional website, its digital presence and available public records — to confirm that it exists, that it operates in the stated sector and that its contact channels are active.

blocks.title: Keeping the catalogue current
blocks.body: The catalogue is reviewed periodically. When a list no longer reflects the market it describes, we take it off sale rather than leave it up.

delivery.title: What you receive
delivery.body: Each purchase gives you a market-study PDF with the companies in the list you chose.

limits.title: What we do not promise
limits.body: We do not promise that every company will reply to you, or that a list replaces your own assessment before doing business. What we stand behind is the criterion: no company enters a list without being checked against public sources.

cta.title: Still have questions?
cta.body: The most common questions about the lists, delivery and payment are answered in the FAQ.
